text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The holidays are here, but that isn't the only thing
on our minds. This is also a crucial time to make
final preparations for the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But that doesn't mean Nature should wear herself
thin. I decide to come up with a way for her to
relax.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...You got this, Nature... You got this, Nature...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Alll right! Trainer, I'll do one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Nice Nature training with such
determination today, I can't bring myself to tell
her about my R&R plan.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Phew! That's a wrap! I was so focused today.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I've got plans after this, so I better
skedaddle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...I wasn't able to invite her out after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, later that night...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzzzt!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. It's me, Nice Nature.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Um... Can you come out for a second?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, there you are. Over here!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, well, I wanted to dress better than a
tracksuit or school uniform tonight.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's the holidays, right? Sooo...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Here. I got this for you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing impressive, but... I hope it's not too
boring either...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inside the box is a hand-knitted scarf with a
simple design. Its soft fibers put my heart at ease.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I had my mom teach me how to knit, so it should
be pretty sturdy.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But I really don't have an eye for design.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want it to be so tacky that you can't wear
it outside, but I wanted it to have enough
character to not look lame.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
After thinking for some time... it ended up having
no pattern or decoration.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Sorry I couldn't make it cute.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Do you really mean that?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's pretty plain, you know. The only thing going
for it is its sturdiness... You still like it?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I see.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I guess my all-nighter paid off, then! Good, good!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah, by the way...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The folks at the shopping district are having a hot
pot party tonight.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
With each shop bringing their own ingredients,
the hot pot is guaranteed to be good.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What do you think? Wanna go?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Now we're talking!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It'll be good to see people there and lift my
spirits before the race too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well then, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, Nice Nature and I enjoy some
delicious hot pot in the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Um... So, after this...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah-choo!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I would like to say I'm okay, but... it's pretty cold.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I can't believe I forgot to bring my coat!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: The all-nighter might have been pushing it...
choice_data_list: Should I take you back to your dorm?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: No way! I don't wanna waste my courage!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...I mean, I went through all the trouble of getting
permission to leave campus!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Let's slow down a bit... How about a walk?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
This might be our last opportunity to take time
and talk like this before the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: So... please?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay!
choice_data_list: But you have to wear my coat.
But you have to wear my coat.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But you'll be cold...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I'll borrow it. I shouldn't be risking
getting sick.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: In exchange, you need to wear the scarf I gave you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nod and take the scarf before wrapping it
around my neck.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ah, it suits you. I sure know what color looks best
on you, huh!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Don't lose it, okay?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I'll go ahead and borrow that coat, then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fwip!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Nice and toastyyy. Thanks a ton.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's really warm... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Nice Nature and I spend a nice night
together, taking in the festive atmosphere as we
stroll along.
